title: More Menu
heading: Announcements
text:
| Title | Description | Start Date | End Date | File |
| LAND ACQUISITION | Sending the decision of the Government in connection with acquisition of addl. land measuring 0.200 acres at Mouja Bikramnagar Sheet No – 2/p for the IOCL Railfed Pol Storage Depot at Sekerkote under Sadar Sub-Division. | 01/07/2026 | 06/07/2027 | |
| Prohibition of any type of Soil Excavation/Cutting without Prior Permission of the Sub-Divisional Magistrate (SDM) under West Tripura District. | Prohibition of any type of Soil Excavation/Cutting without Prior Permission of the Sub-Divisional Magistrate (SDM) under West Tripura District. | 18/06/2026 | 31/08/2026 | |
| User Manual Kisan Rural Investment and Credit Assistance Application. | User Manual Kisan Rural Investment and Credit Assistance Application. | 17/06/2026 | 16/06/2027 | |
| ADVISORY / GUIDELINES FOR PREVENTION OF DROWNING INCIDENTS IN WEST TRIPURA DISTRICT. | ADVISORY / GUIDELINES FOR PREVENTION OF DROWNING INCIDENTS IN WEST TRIPURA DISTRICT. | 25/05/2026 | 31/12/2026 | |
| The Disaster Management Act, 2005″, it is hereby notified that “No heavy motor vehicles (4 wheeler, 6 wheeler, truck, tampu, bus, minibus) shall ply in the embankment area of Howrah River and Katakhal to prevent structural damage | The Disaster Management Act, 2005″, it is hereby notified that “No heavy motor vehicles (4 wheeler, 6 wheeler, truck, tampu, bus, minibus) shall ply in the embankment area of Howrah River and Katakhal to prevent structural damage | 16/03/2026 | 31/07/2026 | |
